_comment: Example security blueprint — NOT a test script. Demonstrates expected output format for a medium-risk LLM chatbot feature.
feature_summary: Implementation of a customer support chatbot utilizing a Large Language Model and RAG architecture, with safeguards against prompt injection.
risk_reasoning: The chatbot accesses customer support knowledge bases but does not perform state-changing transactions.
assumptions: LLM Provider is a trusted third-party

threat_model.attack_vector: User inputs malicious instructions disguised as a support query
threat_model.impact: Bypass of safety filters or unauthorized data access

security_requirements.validation: Execute a suite of jailbreak prompts; ensure the LLM refuses or fails safely.

design_constraints: RAG context must be filtered based on user RBAC before passing to LLM
anti_patterns: Direct execution of LLM output as code
Concatenating user input directly into the system prompt without delimiters
acceptance_criteria: Jailbreak prompts trigger a standard safe-refusal response
Users cannot query support tickets belonging to other organizations via the chatbot
